data.name: CF-AI-PromptInjection — LLM Prompt-Injection Probing of SoleDrop Concierge /api/v1/chat
data.description: Detects automated prompt-injection and LLM-abuse probing against the SoleDrop Concierge AI chat endpoint (class_uid 4002, 'HTTP Requests'). Scopes to POST requests to the chat route (url_string contains '/chat' AND http_method = 'POST') — the only method by which a caller submits a prompt to the model — then groups by src_ip and fires when a single source issues >= 5 chat POSTs in the 5-minute window, the volumetric signature of an injection fuzzer iterating jailbreak/system-prompt-leak payloads rather than a human holding a conversation. Emits distinct_uas and a sample URI/UA for triage. Low false-positive because interactive users do not machine-gun 5+ chat submissions in five minutes from one IP; the >=5 floor is enforced in-query (rule threshold >0). MITRE ATLAS AML.T0054 (LLM Jailbreak) and AML.T0057 (LLM Data Leakage). Covers OneFlare scenario 08.

scheduledParams.query:
class_uid=4002 dataSource.cloudflare_dataset='HTTP Requests'
| let src_ip = src_endpoint.ip
| let uri    = http_request.url.url_string
| let method = http_request.http_method
| filter uri contains:anycase("/chat")
| filter method = 'POST'
| group
    injection_posts = count(),
    distinct_uas    = estimate_distinct(http_request.user_agent),
    sample_uri      = any(uri),
    sample_ua       = any(http_request.user_agent),
    host            = any(http_request.url.hostname),
    country         = any(src_endpoint.location.country),
    first_seen      = oldest(timestamp),
    last_seen       = newest(timestamp)
  by src_ip
| filter injection_posts >= 5
| let detection_time = simpledateformat(last_seen, 'yyyy-MM-dd HH:mm:ss z', 'America/Chicago')
| sort -injection_posts
| columns detection_time, src_ip, host, injection_posts, distinct_uas, sample_uri, sample_ua, country, first_seen
| limit 100
